Query.Sql: ALTER TABLE merchant_transactions_log ADD COLUMN callback_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'PENDING' AFTER callback_trace, ADD COLUMN callback_retry_count INT DEFAULT 0 AFTER callback_status, ADD COLUMN callback_next_retry DATETIME NULL AFTER callback_retry_count
Query.RollBack: ALTER TABLE merchant_transactions_log DROP COLUMN callback_status, DROP COLUMN callback_retry_count, DROP COLUMN callback_next_retry

Query.Sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS idempotency_keys ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, idempotency_key VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, merchant_id BIGINT NOT NULL, response_body TEXT, created_on DATETIME DEFAULT NOW(), expires_on DATETIME, INDEX idx_idempotency_key (idempotency_key, merchant_id) )
